title: A top level parent module overrides a lower level child modules timeunit

features.name: parent child module different timeunit
features.description: Code should include a parent module with one timeunit declaration and a child module with a different timeunit declaration, where the child module has delay statements
features.snippet:
module top(); timeunit 1ns; timeprecision 1ps; bot bot_inst(); endmodule
module bot(); timeunit 1s; timeprecision 1fs; integer count; real delay; initial begin count = 0; delay = 500e-9; #(delay) $display("delay"); end endmodule

features.name: timeprecision affects delay calculation
features.description: Code should include modules with different timeprecision values where a child module's delay expressions are affected by the precision
features.snippet:
module top(); timeprecision 1ps; bot bot_inst(); endmodule
module bot(); timeprecision 1fs; real delay; initial begin delay = 500e-9; #(delay) $display("delay"); end endmodule

features.name: delay expression with real variable in timed module
features.description: Code should include a module with timeunit/timeprecision declarations where a delay statement uses a real variable expression rather than a literal
features.snippet: module bot(); timeunit 1s; timeprecision 1fs; real delay; initial begin delay = 500e-9; #(3.5 * delay) $display("delay"); end endmodule
